title: Talk about sleep
subtitle: Explain sleep habits and problems.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I usually sleep well, but last night I woke up twice.
我通常睡得好，但昨晚醒了两次。
I should stop using my phone before bed.
我应该睡前停止使用手机。
Not really. I woke up twice last night.
不太好。我昨晚醒了两次。

items.en: I usually sleep well, but last night I woke up twice.
items.zh: 我通常睡得好，但昨晚醒了两次。

items.en: I should stop using my phone before bed.
items.zh: 我应该睡前停止使用手机。

items.en: Not really. I woke up twice last night.
items.zh: 不太好。我昨晚醒了两次。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Not really. I woke up twice last night.
lines.zh: 不太好。我昨晚醒了两次。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I should stop using my phone before bed.
lines.zh: 我应该睡前停止使用手机。

items.en: I usually sleep well, but last night I woke up twice.
items.zh: 我通常睡得好，但昨晚醒了两次。

items.en: I should stop using my phone before bed.
items.zh: 我应该睡前停止使用手机。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
